subcodes.first_line: It is among the customs of the Turkish government that they read aloud the decree in the presence of the accused, that he may know his fate [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: از عادت حکومت ترکیه است که حکم فرمان را بحضور مقصر میخوانند تا تکلیف خود
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @martyrs and martyrdom, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
